title: Fields of 1918 (WW1 Mod)
description: This mod adds World War 1 tanks, weapons, uniforms, grenades and much more
body:
FO18 is a large-scale World War I mod for Minecraft inspired by Battlefield 1.
This mod adds **90+ weapons, over 15 tanks, uniforms, grenades, melee weapons** and more historical content that will keep expanding through large content updates.


##  **Required libraries**

This mod requires:

[GeckoLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)

[playerAnimator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator)

# Weapons: 

This project features **over 90 weapons** from Battlefield 1, as well as various experimental weapons from World War I.

Rifles, pistols, machine guns, shotguns, sidearms, and melee weapons are all part of the arsenal.
All weapons follow intuitive controls:

- Right click to shoot
- R to reload
- Some weapons support bayonet attacks in close combat

All weapons are craftable.

Each weapon consists of a separate part. To view all crafting recipes, it is best to download JEI.

![SMG 08](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b3a81ab9c8b38daed467f7c25540199906153d0.jpeg)

# Tanks:

FO18 also includes a large selection of World War I tanks, including several lesser-known and prototype vehicles.

Tanks are more than just decoration - they are fully usable combat machines.

Tank features:
- WASD movement
- Weapon seats with different firing positions 
- Number keys to switch between weapons (For example number 1 switches your camera to the main gun, number two switches your camera to the weapon on the left)
- Camera changes depending on the seat you are using
- X to repair the tank while holding the button
- Some tanks include a unique ability activated with 0

![A7V](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0033b135c0d19e64d57b6caf63df309f55874fa.jpeg)

# Uniforms:

The mod includes historical uniforms from multiple nations, with different combat roles and special variants.
For now, the mod includes only a few countries, however, there are plans to add the uniforms of all the countries that existed during World War I in the future.

# Blocks: 

The mod introduces a wide variety of World War I-themed blocks for recreating World War I trenches.

- Many types of barbed wire
- Trench fences
- Decorative blocks
and much more.

![Trench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab70bbab47687f57aa2f9831003175f0d319f8a5.jpeg)
  
## 
Bug reports, progress posts, and update news are available on my Discord:
